category_sources: source_facts.description says Rollup is a next-generation ES module bundler; official rollupjs.org describes it as the JavaScript module bundler.
display_name_sources: Official rollupjs.org and GitHub organization identify the project as Rollup; source_facts.name is rollup.
docs_sources: Official Rollup website is a dedicated documentation site with get started, configuration, options, plugin, and guide content.
repo_sources: Official rollupjs.org links to GitHub; official GitHub organization pins rollup/rollup as the Rollup repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an ES module bundler; official site describes JavaScript bundling, output formats, tree-shaking, code-splitting, and plugins.
